adminEdits.comment: Cut short — Maria left 30 min early for dentist; she forgot to clock out.
Clock-out ran 15 min past actual — trimmed.
End time corrected — cameras show they left 30 min earlier.

weekApprovals.rejectionComment: Thursday's hours look off — 9:00 AM start but the GPS was still at home. Please double-check and resubmit.

editRequests.comment: I forgot to clock in when I arrived — actual start was ~30 min earlier.
